items.name_en: đź’•Includes full original green box packagingđź’•GGđź‘‰The Gucci Cosmogonie collection debuted at the historic Montecastle in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Purple soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.

Model: 726274.
Dimensions: 39(W)x 38(H)x 2(D)
Color: Purple/Original leather.
